text: I arrive as junior developer learning where to start. My past: I know Git basics but product menus and enterprise language can make me feel like I do not belong yet.
My screen is iPhone 13 (390x844, mobile).
Today I want to: Find a clear beginner path without drowning in product categories.
My life goal is: Become employable without losing confidence to confusing tooling.
I have 100 life-years. Each meaningful action costs 1 month(s); each committed dollar costs 1 year(s).

label: arrival
title: GitHub · Change is constant. GitHub keeps you ahead. · GitHub
visibleText: Skip to content Navigation Menu Sign in Mona the Octocat, Copilot, and Ducky float jubilantly upward from behind the GitHub product demo accompanied by a purple glow and a scattering of stars. I think: I feel curious, but the first screen is more grand and shiny than beginner-friendly.
My reaction: I like the energy, but I am not yet seeing the simple starting path I need.
Idea: Add a clear beginner route near the top, like "Start learning GitHub" with three plain steps.
Life-cost decision: Spending 1 month to explore is worth it if I can quickly find a beginner path toward becoming employable without losing confidence.
Truth assessment: My honest judgment is that GitHub feels important and credible, but this screen assumes more confidence than I have. Confidence: high.
My impulse is to explore.
I think: I suddenly feel like waiting a little longer could pay off.
I follow a hunch and check /.

I think: I feel pulled in by Codespaces and Copilot, but the page still feels like a wall of product names before it feels like a beginner path.
My reaction: My reaction is curious but slightly guarded; I want GitHub to tell me what to do first, not just what exists.
Idea: Add a beginner route that says, “Start here if you know Git basics,” with three clear next steps.
Life-cost decision: Spending 1 more month of life is worth it only if exploring reveals a simple next step toward employability.
Truth assessment: My honest judgment is that this looks powerful but not yet comforting for someone trying to become employable; confidence 0.78.
My impulse is to explore.
I try "/contact/i" and watch whether the app reacts clearly.

label: post-/contact/i
